answers: SEO, Social Media, Content Marketing, Email Marketing, Analytics. Track and optimize!
Digital marketing essentials: SEO for organic traffic, social media for reach, email for retention, and analytics to track what's working.
Start with SEO basics — keyword research, on-page optimisation, and backlinks. Then add social media and email marketing to your strategy.
Marketing tip: content is king. Create valuable content consistently, optimise for search, build an email list, and always measure your results.
